bot.welcome:
Welcome to VIRAL Arena Bot! ⚔️

The ultimate Web3 PVP Arena inside Telegram. Play Rock-Paper-Scissors with real-time stakes, climb the leaderboard, and complete daily missions!
bot.help:
⚔️ *VIRAL Arena Bot Help Menu*

Available Commands:
/arena - Launch the Web3 PVP Mini App
/duel [stake] - Host a public/community duel challenge
/balance - Check your current vVIRAL balance
/myrank - View your current level and global rank
/missions - View your available missions
/help - View this help list
bot.insufficientBalance: ⚠️ @{username}, you do not have enough vVIRAL balance! You need {stake} vVIRAL.
bot.activeDuelError: ⚠️ @{username}, you already have an active pending or in-progress duel! Settle it first.
bot.challengeCreated:
⚔️ *VIRAL DUEL CHALLENGE*

@{username} entered the Arena!

Stake: {stake}

Who accepts the battle?
bot.cancelled:
❌ *VIRAL DUEL CANCELLED*

The challenger left the Arena.
bot.expired:
❌ *DUEL CHALLENGE EXPIRED*

The challenge hosted by @{username} has expired. Any stakes have been refunded.
bot.profileNotFound: ⚠️ @{username}, your duelist profile is not initialized. Please open the app first to register and claim your 500 vVIRAL welcome bonus!
bot.cooldown: ⏳ *Arena Cooldown:* Please wait {seconds}s before challenging again.
bot.balanceReply:
💰 *VIRAL Wallet Balance*

Player: @{username}
Balance: {vViral} vVIRAL
Reserved: {reserved} vVIRAL
bot.missionsTitle:
🎯 *VIRAL Arena Active Missions*

Check your active missions in the App! Complete them to earn extra vVIRAL rewards.
